timeline.cal2_c1_sat_parties_notes: We are having our first dinner party the following night and need to get caught.
timeline.cal2_c1_w4_discovery_notes: We are doing this one to get everyone back on track. We will do another Next Steps 1 and 2 later in the month.
timeline.cal2_c1_w2_dinner_notes: Expecting 10 new people plus a half dozen kids. We will have some existing team members too. A dinner party is to further relationships and to solidify the launch team commitment. Having a couple of Chefs come over and handle the cooking and cleanup. Grilling Smash burgers, hot dogs, smoked mac n cheese, baked beans, and dessert.
timeline.cal2_c2_w5_catchup_notes: Short 5th week of cycle two, but you are only having the Discovery Class, so it's not a heavy load. Plenty of time to play catch-up.
timeline.cal2_c2_serve_day_notes: 9 am setup. Start event at 11:00. We will serve the community around the Virginia St basketball courts. We need to put the word out the weekend prior and flyer the hood. We will grill out for the community and hand out clothing, non-perishable food, and baby items.
timeline.cal2_c2_sat_parties_notes: The idea is to have small parties in satellite areas of Farmville, i.e., Rice, Prospect, Dilwyn, etc.
timeline.custom_custom_1a_notes: Meet at Dales Dairy Bar Icecream
timeline.cal2_c2_w2_dinner_notes: Changing to a Dessert Social and Coffee.
timeline.cal2_c1_w1_interest_notes: Relaxed event. Worked it in three phases. 1 to 2, 2 to 3, 3 to 4. Phase 1 was best. We had a good group in the first meeting. Out of this came 4 new launch members. Out the last one came a new convert and LT member.
timeline.cal2_c1_w5_catchup_notes: This 5th week is from April 2nd to April 9. This is catchup time and time for prep for the next event.
timeline.cal2_c1_w3_foundations_notes: We held Next Step 1 out of sequence on March 6th for our early adopters, and will follow up with a second session shortly after the dinner party on April 1st to get back on track. The first session was exclusively open to those who had already committed to the launch team. We held this event at the Historic Weyanoke Hotel. Eight people officially became members of IF Church that evening, and I expect several more to join in the coming days.
timeline.cal2_c2_w1_interest_notes: venue secured. See Workflow for checklist items. Setup starts at 3:30. Finish the event by 6. Breakdown finished by 6:30

At our event on March 15th, we added our last one, and it all happened by circumstance. We started up a conversation with our last group coming in, and one of them had a divine appointment. \nOn another note, I had a coffee appointment with SB. He's only 46 years old and his body is failing him. He got into an accident and damaged his internal organs. In time, he became diabetic. He has stage 5 kidney failure and is not a candidate for transplant. He was so ready to hear about the things of God. I was able to lead him to the Lord right there at Starbucks. I have been in touch with him, and he is still really struggling. I will continue to follow up. "}],"alerts":[{"id":1774551827007,"text":"Need to schedule a Virtual Interest Party. That is high on my radar. "}]}
